title: Remove admin/edit overlay panel (CustomizationPrompt) from the site

requirements.summary: Fully remove the CustomizationPrompt component and all references to it from the codebase
acceptanceCriteria: The 'What would you like to change?' dialog/overlay no longer appears on page load or at any point during site navigation.
CustomizationPrompt.tsx is deleted or no longer referenced anywhere in the project.
No auto-display timer (setTimeout/800ms) for the overlay remains in App.tsx.
The site renders normally without any admin panel for all visitors across all devices.

file_operations.description: Delete the CustomizationPrompt component file completely from the codebase.

Remove the import statement for CustomizationPrompt, delete all state management related to the dialog (including the 800ms setTimeout auto-display timer), and remove the CustomizationPrompt JSX element from the render tree so the overlay never appears.
